Class WaitingList

java.lang.Object
Entities.WaitingList
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class WaitingList extends Object implements Serializable
Represents a waiting list for a single day in the restaurant. Contains multiple WaitingListEntry objects and provides methods to manage and retrieve the list.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private List<WaitingListEntry>
    waitingList
    List of all entries in the waiting list.
    private LocalDate
    waitingListDate
    The date for which this waiting list applies.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    WaitingList(LocalDate waitingListDate)
    Constructs a new WaitingList for the specified date.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addEntryToWaitingList(WaitingListEntry waitingListEntry)
    Adds a new entry to the waiting list.
    List<WaitingListEntry>
    getCurrentWaitingList()
    Returns the current waiting list, including only entries whose exit reason is still null (i.e., they have not yet left or been seated).
    List<WaitingListEntry>
    getWaitingList()
    Returns the list of all waiting list entries.
    LocalDate
    getWaitingListDate()
    Returns the date of the waiting list.

    • waitingListDate

      private LocalDate waitingListDate
      The date for which this waiting list applies.

    • WaitingList

      public WaitingList(LocalDate waitingListDate)
      Constructs a new WaitingList for the specified date.

      waitingListDate - the date for the waiting list

  • Method Details

    • getWaitingList

      public List<WaitingListEntry> getWaitingList()
      Returns the list of all waiting list entries.
      Returns:
      list of WaitingListEntry objects

    • getWaitingListDate

      public LocalDate getWaitingListDate()
      Returns the date of the waiting list.
      Returns:
      the waiting list date

    • addEntryToWaitingList

      public void addEntryToWaitingList(WaitingListEntry waitingListEntry)
      Adds a new entry to the waiting list.
      Parameters:
      waitingListEntry - the entry to add

    • getCurrentWaitingList

      public List<WaitingListEntry> getCurrentWaitingList()
      Returns the current waiting list, including only entries whose exit reason is still null (i.e., they have not yet left or been seated).
      Returns:
      list of current WaitingListEntry objects
